message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Delayed Order #[Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the recent delivery of my order, #[Order Number], which was placed on [Date of Purchase].

According to the shipping confirmation provided, the estimated delivery date was [Original Estimated Delivery Date]. However, the package did not arrive until [Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. This significant delay caused considerable inconvenience, as I had planned to use the items for [briefly mention reason, e.g., a specific event, gift, or project], which has now been compromised.

Furthermore, upon opening the package, I discovered that the contents were severely damaged. Specifically, [describe the damage in detail, e.g., the box was crushed, the item was cracked, or the packaging was torn open]. I have attached clear photographs of the damaged packaging and the item itself for your reference.

Given that the item arrived late and in a damaged condition, I am requesting a full refund of the purchase price, including shipping costs. Alternatively, if a replacement is available, I would prefer an expedited replacement sent via a premium shipping service at no additional cost to ensure timely delivery.

Please let me know how you intend to resolve this matter. I expect a response within [e.g., 3-5] business days. I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [Number] years and hope to resolve this issue amicably so that I may continue to do business with you in the future.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this serious matter.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Address]
[Order Number]

**Attachments:**
1. Photo of damaged packaging
2. Photo of damaged item
3
